subject: [DCAE] Dashboard healthcheck failure
commit_message:
[DCAE] Dashboard healthcheck failure

Remove resource limit setting to resolve orange
gating/daily job failures

Switched to 1.4.4 released image from nexus3.

Change-Id: Ie5d7979cbd6d6a950519228c2e61c432f363b9f6
Signed-off-by: vv770d <vv770d@att.com>
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2800
Signed-off-by: vv770d <vv770d@att.com>
(cherry picked from commit 4c64ef138c221f934a2642b2d20c8d66d486cb61)

entries.message: Patch Set 1: Cherry Picked from branch master.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 17 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

dashboard:1.4.4 container includes fix for handling special character (in the generated PG password); this was originally found in master branch and addressed. Was reported similar issue noticed also on H release branch hence backporting this fix.
